action.reasoning: Observation: feature cross-sectional z-score normalization hurt test IC (0.054627), while the best remains the raw 10-model LightGBM ensemble at 0.057296. Analysis: target z-scoring also underperformed but was close, suggesting full volatility normalization may remove useful signal; a milder target transform that only removes daily market return (cross-sectional demean) may align with IC while preserving return dispersion. Decision: train the existing proven 10-model LightGBM ensemble on daily demeaned labels through 2021, smoke-test predict.py, and submit for evaluation.
action.command: python train_cs.py --out checkpoints/cs_demean_v1 --num_models 10 --target_transform demean --include_valid_train --num_threads 20 && python predict.py --data_path /data --checkpoint checkpoints/cs_demean_v1 --output local_pred_cs_demean_v1.json
